# HPD-ML-DataSources

- Package: `HPD-ML-DataSources`
- Version: `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.DataSources`
- Exported types: 13

## HPD.ML.DataSources

- [`CsvDataHandle`](../types/hpd-ml-datasources-csvdatahandle.md) - Lazy IDataHandle backed by a CSV file. Schema is inferred on construction (scanning first N rows). Data streams lazily via cursor — file is not loaded into memory.
- [`CsvOptions`](../types/hpd-ml-datasources-csvoptions.md) - Configuration for CSV loading.
- [`CsvWriter`](../types/hpd-ml-datasources-csvwriter.md) - Writes any IDataHandle to a CSV file.
- [`DataSourceExtensions`](../types/hpd-ml-datasources-datasourceextensions.md) - C# 14 extension members for data source discovery. Enables: IDataHandle.LoadCsv("data.csv")
- [`DictionaryDataHandle`](../types/hpd-ml-datasources-dictionarydatahandle.md) - Creates an InMemoryDataHandle from a sequence of string-keyed dictionaries. Useful for dynamic data (API responses, config-driven schemas).
- [`EnumerableDataHandle`](../types/hpd-ml-datasources-enumerabledatahandle.md) - Creates an InMemoryDataHandle from IEnumerable&lt;T&gt; using a user-provided schema mapper. AOT-safe — no reflection.
- [`JsonDataHandle`](../types/hpd-ml-datasources-jsondatahandle.md) - Lazy IDataHandle backed by a JSON or JSONL file. Schema is inferred on construction. Data streams lazily.
- [`JsonOptions`](../types/hpd-ml-datasources-jsonoptions.md) - Configuration for JSON/JSONL loading.
- [`MissingValuePolicy`](../types/hpd-ml-datasources-missingvaluepolicy.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`ParquetDataHandle`](../types/hpd-ml-datasources-parquetdatahandle.md) - IDataHandle backed by an Apache Parquet file. Supports zero-copy columnar batch access via TryGetColumnBatch. Schema is read from Parquet metadata (no inference scan needed).
- [`ParquetOptions`](../types/hpd-ml-datasources-parquetoptions.md) - Configuration for Parquet loading.
- [`ParquetWriter`](../types/hpd-ml-datasources-parquetwriter.md) - Writes any IDataHandle to Apache Parquet format. Prefers columnar batch path when available for zero-copy writes.
- [`RowsDataHandle`](../types/hpd-ml-datasources-rowsdatahandle.md) - Creates an InMemoryDataHandle from explicit rows. For testing and small datasets.
